title: calamintha acinos f. villosa
intro: Calamintha acinos f. villosa, also known as hairy basil or mountain basil, is a fragrant, perennial herb belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and carminative effects. The health benefits of Calamintha acinos f. villosa include alleviating digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Calamintha acinos f. villosa include teas, infusions, and essential oil, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
